REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. AMENDED DEMURRER FILED. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND, SUBJECT TO OPPOSITION. THE COMPLAINT FAILS TO STATE A CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE THE NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CCP 1161(2) BECAUSE IT DOES NOT STATE THE COMPLETE ADDRESS OF THE PERSON TO WHOM RENT PAYMENT SHALL BE MADE. THIS DEFECT CANNOT BE CURED BY AMENDING THE COMPLAINT. PROPOSED ORDER SIGNED AND FILED THIS DAY. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: K. VALDES; NOT REPORTED. (D505)

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 79732331)
